title: The Magic Patio — San Francisco’s Magic Speakeasy
content: The Magic Patio — San Francisco’s Magic Speakeasy. # THE MAGIC PATIO. #### San Francisco’s best kept secret, a magic speakeasy in the heart of The Mission. #### From a backyard popup to San Francisco’s premiere magic experience. ## Welcome to The Magic Patio. ## A new way to experience magic. Recently featured in *The Wall Street Journal*, The Magic Patio now offers unique and interactive virtual shows for corporate teams. ## Private events at The Patio. Book your next birthday, anniversary, or special event at The Magic Patio. Step into an inexplicable world of magic happening in the heart of San Francisco. ## A NEW KIND OF STARTUP. From backyard patio to San Francisco’s most sought-after magic experience, Andrew uses his background in engineering and design to create an intimate, urban Disneyland. Andrew is the Magic & Illusions Lead for the San Francisco production of Harry Potter and the Cursed Child. Listen to this KQED interview where he talks about creating the magic on stage.

title: The Magic Patio in the Mission is The Best Magic Show You ... - Reddit
content: The magic happens in a small room with less than 60 seats, a velvet curtain, and fairy lights galore offering the illusion of a cozy patio.
